name: Swim in Rising Water
description: Given an n x n grid where grid[i][j] represents elevation, at time t the water depth is t everywhere. You can swim from (i,j) to adjacent cells if both elevations are <= t. Find the minimum time to swim from (0,0) to (n-1,n-1).
constraints: n == grid.length. n == grid[i].length. 1 <= n <= 50. 0 <= grid[i][j] < n^2. Each value appears exactly once.
python_template:

performance.stress_intent: exercise minimax grid traversal on all 2x2 permutations and handpicked 3x3 boards; performance enforcement is deferred
